departments.name: Computer Science & IT
departments.vision: To lead the region in computing innovation and digital transformation.
departments.mission: Preparing future leaders through rigorous technical training and research excellence in computing.

departments.name: Electrical Engineering
departments.vision: To be the hub of sustainable energy and industrial automation research.
departments.mission: Empowering students with advanced engineering skills for the evolving energy landscape.

pos.text: Apply knowledge of computing fundamentals to solve complex problems.
Design and develop efficient software systems using modern standards.
Work effectively in multidisciplinary teams as a leader or member.
Communicate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences.
Analyze high-level requirements into scalable software architecture.
Demonstrate proficiency in modern software engineering lifecycles.
Adapt to emerging technologies through lifelong learning.

gas.name: Problem Analysis
gas.description: Identify, research, and analyze complex problems.

gas.name: Individual & Teamwork
gas.description: Work as individual or in teams.
